name: Cleaner & Degreaser
description: RuggedRed Cleaner & Degreaser is a heavy-duty, industrial-strength formula designed to tackle tough grease, oil, and grime in kitchens, garages, appliances, and more. Safe for stainless steel, countertops, grills, and heavy-use areas, it wipes away messes without streaks or sticky residue. Non-toxic, eco-friendly, and made in the USA, RuggedRed makes deep cleaning effortless.
benefits: Effortless Heavy-Duty Cleaning – Quickly breaks down tough grease, oil, and grime for easy wipe-away cleaning
Time-Saving Formula – Fast-acting degreaser cuts cleaning time in half.
Eliminates Odors – Fresh citrus scent removes foul smells and leaves a clean, crisp aroma.
Grease-Free, Streak-Free Shine – Cleans without leaving behind sticky residue or streaks.

Plus, it’s non-toxic, eco-friendly, and proudly made in the USA.
benefits: Effortless Deep Cleaning – Quickly breaks down tough grease, grime, and stains so you don’t have to scrub hard.

For heavily soiled areas, spray and let sit for 30 seconds before wiping.
For porous surfaces, or surfaces you are unsure of, test first in a small hidden area.
Dilution Instructions
Heavy Duty Cleaning - Full Strength or Mix 1:1
Light Duty Cleaning - Mix 1:8
Note - For best results, use Full Strength.
